chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P. No. D – 92 of 2020 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Hearing of case For hearing of main case 13-01-2022 Mian Mumtaz Rabbani, Advocate for the Intervenors. Mr. Zulfiqar Ali Naich, Assistant Advocate General Sindh..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- None present on behalf of the Petitioners nor any intimation is received; whereas, there is no private Respondent in this Petition. However, from time to time, various orders have been passed by the Court, which include directions to the official Respondents to see that if there are any encroachments on the graveyard in question, then appropriate action be taken in accordance with law. There is also one report as noted in order dated 18-03-2021 filed by the Assistant Commissioner and Mukhtiarkar, Rohri, which had stated that after measurement and demarcation, there is no encroachment except a piece of 30 to 35 feet; however, the Court was not satisfied, and thereafter, Civil Judge, Rohri was also appointed as Commissioner to examine the issue and file his report. It further appears that such report is already on record and various directions have been issued to the concerned Respondents to act pursuant to the said report of the concerned Civil Judge. Since nobody has turned up on behalf of the Petitioners, we while disposing of this Petition, direct the official Respondents to comply with the orders already passed in this matter and shall act strictly in accordance with law. With these observations, the Petition stands disposed of. Insofar as applications by any of the intervenors are concerned, they may seek appropriate remedy independently in accordance with law.

With these observations, the Petition stands disposed of. Insofar as applications by any of the intervenors are concerned, they may seek appropriate remedy independently in accordance with law. J U D G E J U D G E Abdul Basit
